title: Vaccine Communication Resources for Health Care Providers | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC
text:
ine Communication Resources for Health Care Providers 
Key points 
CDC has a number of communication resources to help health care providers educate their patients about vaccinations. 
Use this tool to quickly find relevant resources to use or share. 
Additional resources 
Looking for vaccine communication materials for patients ? Visit the Communication Resources page.
Looking for easy-to-download zip files ? Visit the Communication and Print Resources for Public Health page.
August 14, 2024
